"'''Relic'''" was an article for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]], and was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
The article detailed the quest for a [[Kashi Mer talisman|relic]] of the [[Kashi Mer Dynasty]], by a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agents who were competing with the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark Jedi]], [[Durrei]].
{{Plot|story}}
